ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields readable.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. 3 pages, all fields readable.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate contains reference 'Nouryon Ref: 5103458970' which is an order/delivery reference, not an LC reference. No field labelled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar found.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: header 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' at top of page
Invoice page 2: header 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' at top of page
Invoice page 2: footer 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, Customer Service, Gothenburg, Sweden'
Invoice page 3: header 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' at top of page
Invoice page 3: multiple references to 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' in receivables text and footer

criteria_met: Consignor 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' identified in invoice header on all pages (criterion 2)
Consignee 'H.W. Coates Ltd' identified in invoice Ship To field (criterion 3)
Certificate Nouryon Ref 5103458970 matches invoice Our Order/Delivery No. 5103458970 (criterion 1 - order reference match)
pairing_validation.reasoning: All three pairing criteria are met. The certificate consignor matches the invoice issuer, the certificate consignee matches the invoice Ship To party, and the Nouryon reference number matches.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, Gamlestadsvägen 18, 41502, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, BOX 47067, 402 58 Goteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.details: Consignor name 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' found exactly in invoice header on all 3 pages, in VAT block, and in footer. Direct match as invoice issuer.
Certificate: 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB'. Invoice issuer: 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate country: Sweden. Invoice header: 'Sweden' explicitly stated. Additionally, VAT number SE556013898301 contains SE prefix confirming Sweden. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found in invoice header
Country verification via VAT prefix SE

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Consignor 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' in certificate matches exactly the invoice issuer 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' shown in the header on all invoice pages. Country Sweden confirmed both by explicit text in the invoice header and by the SE prefix in VAT number SE556013898301. Address differs (Gamlestadsvägen 18 vs BOX 47067) but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not medföra MISMATCH when name and country match.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Different address (street vs box) could indicate different entity
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rule 4.1.5 explicitly states that address differences do not medföra MISMATCH when company name and country match. Same legal entity, different address format.

checkpoints.certificate_value: H.W. Coates Ltd, Reception A, Middlewich Road Ind Est, Byley, CW10 9NT MIDDLEWICH, UNITED KINGDOM
checkpoints.invoice_value: Ship To: H.W. Coates Ltd, Reception A, Middlewich Road Ind Est, Byley, CW10 9NT MIDDLEWICH, UNITED KINGDOM

comparison_steps.result: Bill To / Sold To identified as IMCD UK Limited. Certificate consignee is H.W. Coates Ltd — different from Bill To party.

comparison_steps.details: Condition 1: Certificate consignee 'H.W. Coates Ltd' exactly matches invoice Ship To 'H.W. Coates Ltd' with identical address. Condition 2: Invoice Bill To is 'IMCD UK Limited' — a different party (distribution/trading company). Condition 3: Both parties appear in the same invoice — confirming a single supply chain transaction. Condition 4: Nothing in the invoice contradicts H.W. Coates Ltd as the end recipient. All conditions met → Ship-To exception applies → MATCH.
Certificate: UNITED KINGDOM. Invoice Ship To: UNITED KINGDOM. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Ship-To-regel - Certificate of Origin issued for end recipient (Ship-To party)

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'H.W. Coates Ltd' does not match the invoice Bill To / Sold To party 'IMCD UK Limited'. However, rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To exception) applies: the certificate consignee is the end recipient of the goods (Ship To party in the invoice). H.W. Coates Ltd is identified exactly in the invoice Ship To field with identical address (Reception A, Middlewich Road Ind Est, Byley, CW10 9NT MIDDLEWICH, UNITED KINGDOM). The Bill To party IMCD UK Limited is a separate trading/distribution company. Both parties appear in the same invoice confirming they are part of the same supply chain. Country matches: UNITED KINGDOM in both documents. All conditions of 4.2.0.3 are satisfied → MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because Bill To is IMCD UK Limited, not H.W. Coates Ltd
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To exception) explicitly allows COO to be issued for the end recipient (Ship-To party). All four conditions of the exception are satisfied. COO follows the goods flow, invoice follows the payment flow.

checkpoints.certificate_value: ETHOMEEN O/12, BEROL R648 NG, ETHYLAN 1005, AROMOX T/12 HFP, BEROL ENV 226 PLUS, BEROL LFG 61, BEROL DGR 81, BEROL R648 PO
checkpoints.invoice_value: ETHOMEEN O/12, BEROL R648 NG, ETHYLAN 1005, AROMOX T/12 HFP, BEROL ENV 226 PLUS, BEROL LFG 61, BEROL DGR 81, BEROL R648 PO

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in certificate
comparison_steps.result: No explicit article numbers (part codes) in the certificate. Product names are the primary identifiers. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Match each product name from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.details: All 8 product names verified: (1) ETHOMEEN O/12 → Invoice Item 10: ETHOMEEN O/12 ✓, (2) BEROL R648 NG → Invoice Item 20: BEROL R648 NG ✓, (3) ETHYLAN 1005 → Invoice Item 30: ETHYLAN 1005 ✓, (4) AROMOX T/12 HFP → Invoice Item 40: AROMOX T/12 HFP ✓, (5) BEROL ENV 226 PLUS → Invoice Item 50: BEROL ENV 226 PLUS ✓, (6) BEROL LFG 61 → Invoice Item 60: BEROL LFG 61 ✓, (7) BEROL DGR 81 → Invoice Item 70: BEROL DGR 81 ✓, (8) BEROL R648 PO → Invoice Item 80: BEROL R648 PO ✓. All exact matches after case normalization.

comparison_steps.result: Certificate includes packaging info (IBC 850 KG, PLASTIC DRUM 200 KG, etc.) which also matches invoice packaging descriptions. These are non-identity-bearing additions that match regardless.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing product names matched exactly
Non-identity-bearing additions (packaging) do not affect matching

checkpoints.debug_explanation: No article numbers present in the certificate; verification proceeds via Priority 2 (controlled text matching). All 8 product names in the certificate (ETHOMEEN O/12, BEROL R648 NG, ETHYLAN 1005, AROMOX T/12 HFP, BEROL ENV 226 PLUS, BEROL LFG 61, BEROL DGR 81, BEROL R648 PO) are exact textual matches to the invoice item descriptions after case normalization. Packaging descriptions also match. No discrepancies found.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate states numerical value and unit
comparison_steps.result: Certificate states 8 quantities in KG net. Both numerical values and unit (KG) are explicit. Category: net weight.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains 8 individual net weight values per product line
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 quantities are per-product net weights. These are the verification-basis quantities.

comparison_steps.description: Match each certificate weight to invoice net weight per item
comparison_steps.details: Item-by-item verification: (1) ETHOMEEN O/12: cert 6,800.000 KG net = invoice NW 6,800.000 KG ✓, (2) BEROL R648 NG: cert 800.000 KG net = invoice NW 800.000 KG ✓, (3) ETHYLAN 1005: cert 760.000 KG net = invoice NW 760.000 KG ✓, (4) AROMOX T/12 HFP: cert 3,200.000 KG net = invoice NW 3,200.000 KG ✓, (5) BEROL ENV 226 PLUS: cert 1,440.000 KG net = invoice NW 1,440.000 KG ✓, (6) BEROL LFG 61: cert 3,000.000 KG net = invoice NW 3,000.000 KG ✓, (7) BEROL DGR 81: cert 840.000 KG net = invoice NW 840.000 KG ✓, (8) BEROL R648 PO: cert 2,000.000 KG net = invoice NW 2,000.000 KG ✓. All 8 weights match exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate uses period as thousands separator (6.800,000). Invoice uses same format. Normalization applied for comparison.
comparison_steps.result: Values are identical after thousands separator normalization.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll - numerical values identified in invoice
Both value and unit (KG net) present in certificate
Weight category 'net' explicitly stated in certificate

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 contains 8 net weight values. Each value is matched against the corresponding invoice item's Net Weight field. The certificate uses European number formatting (period as thousands separator, comma as decimal separator): '6.800,000 KG net' = 6800.000 KG. The invoice uses the same format: 'Net Weight 6.800,000 KG'. After thousands separator normalization (rule 4.4.3.3), all 8 weights are exact matches. Weight category 'net' is explicitly stated in certificate and matches invoice 'Net Weight' fields. No contradictions found.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Gross weight mismatch since certificate does not list gross weights but invoice does
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per rule 4.4.3.1, verification requires MINST EN (at least one) quantity to match. Net weight matches for all items. The fact that invoice also lists gross weights not present in the certificate is additional information, not a contradiction.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Country of Origin: Sweden (all 8 items) + 'products are of European Union preferential origin' (export declaration)

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin declarations in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Found: (1) 'Country of Origin Sweden' for all 8 invoice items (Items 10-80). (2) Export declaration: 'these products are of European Union preferential origin'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate says 'EU Sweden'. Verify Sweden is EU member.
comparison_steps.result: Sweden is an EU member state (EU-27). Certificate origin 'EU Sweden' = EU + Sweden.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU Sweden' (EU combined with one specific member state). Invoice has explicit EU preferential origin declaration AND per-item 'Country of Origin Sweden'.
comparison_steps.details: Per rule 4.5.4.2.1: Certificate origin field combines EU with ONE specific EU member state (Sweden). Invoice contains an explicit EU origin statement ('products are of European Union preferential origin') in the exporter declaration, AND per-item origin 'Sweden' confirms the specific member state. Both components of 'EU Sweden' are verified. No contradicting non-EU origins in invoice. MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 - Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify no non-EU origins present in invoice
comparison_steps.result: All 8 items state 'Country of Origin Sweden'. No non-EU origins found in any item line. PASS.

rules_applied.description: EU member state normalization - Sweden is EU member
General EU origin statement covers 'EU [land]' when combined with one specific member state
Non-EU origin check - no non-EU origins found

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'EU Sweden'. The invoice confirms origin in two ways: (1) Every item line (10-80) explicitly states 'Country of Origin Sweden', and (2) the exporter declaration states 'these products are of European Union preferential origin'. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate states 'EU [one member state]' and invoice confirms both EU origin and the specific member state, this is MATCH. Per rule 4.5.4.1, no non-EU origins are found in the invoice. Full verification achieved.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate
PASS - All three criteria met: order reference match, consignor match, consignee (Ship To) match

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Koncernstruktur - consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - Consignor name found as invoice issuer

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Country verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix SE)
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - SE prefix in VAT number confirms Sweden
MATCH - Certificate consignee H.W. Coates Ltd matches invoice Ship To exactly; Bill To is IMCD UK Limited (trading intermediary)

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - All 8 product names match exactly
MATCH - All 8 net weights match exactly
Applied to normalize European number format (period as thousands separator)
Sweden confirmed as EU member state
MATCH - Invoice EU preferential origin declaration + per-item Sweden origin covers certificate 'EU Sweden'
PASS - No non-EU origins found in invoice

evidence.raw_text: Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, Gamlestadsvägen 18, 41502, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, BOX 47067, 402 58 Goteborg, Sweden
H.W. Coates Ltd, Reception A, Middlewich Road Ind Est, Byley, CW10 9NT MIDDLEWICH, UNITED KINGDOM
H.W. Coates Ltd, Reception A, Middlewich Road Ind Est, Byley, CW10 9NT MIDDLEWICH, UNITED KINGDOM
these products are of European Union preferential origin

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB i Sverige bekräftas i fakturan. Mottagaren H.W. Coates Ltd i Storbritannien identifieras i fakturans leveransadress. Alla åtta kemiska produkter och deras nettovikter matchar exakt. Ursprungslandet EU/Sverige bekräftas genom fakturans ursprungsangivelser per artikel och EU-exportördeklaration.
overall_assessment.summary: All 5 applicable checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor matches invoice issuer exactly. Consignee matches Ship To party (Ship-To exception applied per 4.2.0.3). All 8 product names match exactly. All 8 net weights match exactly. Origin 'EU Sweden' confirmed by per-item 'Sweden' origin and EU preferential origin declaration.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, Gamlestadsvägen 18, 41502, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB, BOX 47067, 402 58 Goteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning med koncernstruktur (4.1.0). Landverifiering via explicit text och VAT-prefix SE (4.1.2.1).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' i Sverige matchar exakt fakturans utställare 'Nouryon Surface Chemistry AB' med adress i Sverige. Adressskillnad (gata vs postbox) påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.certificate_value: H.W. Coates Ltd, Reception A, Middlewich Road Ind Est, Byley, CW10 9NT MIDDLEWICH, UNITED KINGDOM
sections.invoice_value: Ship To: H.W. Coates Ltd, Reception A, Middlewich Road Ind Est, Byley, CW10 9NT MIDDLEWICH, UNITED KINGDOM
sections.rule_applied: Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3): Certifikat utfärdat för slutmottagare. Fakturans Bill To är IMCD UK Limited (handelsföretag), Ship To är H.W. Coates Ltd.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'H.W. Coates Ltd' matchar exakt fakturans leveransadress (Ship To) med identisk adress och land. Fakturans faktureringsfält anger IMCD UK Limited, men Ship-To-regeln tillåter matchning mot slutmottagaren av varorna. Alla villkor uppfyllda.

sections.certificate_value: ETHOMEEN O/12, BEROL R648 NG, ETHYLAN 1005, AROMOX T/12 HFP, BEROL ENV 226 PLUS, BEROL LFG 61, BEROL DGR 81, BEROL R648 PO
sections.invoice_value: ETHOMEEN O/12, BEROL R648 NG, ETHYLAN 1005, AROMOX T/12 HFP, BEROL ENV 226 PLUS, BEROL LFG 61, BEROL DGR 81, BEROL R648 PO
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3). Alla 8 produktnamn matchar exakt.
sections.motivation: Samtliga 8 produktnamn i certifikatet kan identifieras exakt i fakturans artikelrader efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Förpackningsbeskrivningar överensstämmer också.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) med tusentalsavskiljarnormalisering (4.4.3.3). Alla 8 nettovikter matchar exakt.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets 8 nettovikter per produkt i box 7 matchar exakt fakturans Net Weight per artikelrad. Viktkategori 'net' explicit i certifikatet, matchad mot 'Net Weight' i fakturan.

sections.invoice_value: Country of Origin: Sweden (alla 8 artiklar) + 'products are of European Union preferential origin'
sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering (4.5.4.2) och generellt EU-ursprungsuttalande (4.5.4.2.1). Sverige bekräftat som EU-medlemsstat.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'EU Sweden'. Fakturan bekräftar ursprung Sverige per artikelrad (alla 8 artiklar) och EU-ursprung genom exportördeklaration om 'European Union preferential origin'. Inga icke-EU-ursprung i fakturan. Fullständig verifiering av både EU och Sverige.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. No inconsistencies detected.
